# Anders Lybecker's Tech Blog

> A blog about cloud computing, programming, .NET, Azure, containers, and distributed systems by Anders Lybecker — Engineering Lead at Microsoft based in Copenhagen, Denmark.

This is a personal tech blog running since 2006. Posts cover hands-on technical topics including:

- .NET and C# programming (WCF, ASP.NET, Roslyn)
- Cloud computing and Azure (VMs, containers, Kubernetes, AKS)
- Windows and Docker containers
- Database topics (SQL Server, MongoDB)
- Networking (IPv4/IPv6, sockets)
- Software architecture and best practices
- IoT and distributed systems

The blog is built with Jekyll and the Minimal Mistakes theme, hosted on GitHub Pages.

## Recent Posts

- [Supporting IPv4 and IPv6 dual mode network with one socket](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2018/08/23/supporting-ipv4-and-ipv6-dual-mode-network-with-one-socket/): How to create a protocol-agnostic socket solution using DualMode in .NET
- [Composing your own Windows Container with a Dockerfile](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2016/09/02/composing-your-own-windows-container-with-a-dockerfile/): Building custom Windows containers with Docker
- [Getting started with Windows Containers](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2016/08/31/getting-started-with-windows-containers/): Tutorial for deploying Windows Containers on Azure
- [.NET Compiler Platform (Roslyn) analyzer packages](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/08/05/dotnet-compiler-platform-roslyn-analyzer-packages/): Using Roslyn analyzers for code quality

## C# 6 Series

- [Chained null checks](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/06/chained-null-checks/): Null-conditional operators in C# 6
- [The nameof operator](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/08/the-nameof-operator/): Compile-time name resolution
- [Awesome string formatting](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/09/awesome-string-formatting/): String interpolation in C# 6
- [Expression-bodied methods](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/13/expression-bodied-methods/): Lambda-like method syntax
- [Auto-property initializers](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/15/auto-property-initializers/): Inline property initialization
- [Initialize a Dictionary with index initializers](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/01/19/initialize-a-dictionary-with-index-initializers/): New dictionary initialization syntax

## Azure and Cloud

- [Minimizing the cost of dev/test environments in Azure](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/02/25/minimizing-the-cost-of-devtest-environments-in-azure/): Cost optimization strategies
- [How to start and stop Azure VMs at a schedule](https://www.lybecker.com/blog/2015/02/25/how-to-start-and-stop-azure-vms-at-a-schedule/): Automated VM scheduling
